bead.title: Add Harness sub-interfaces and universal types (CONTRACT-004 Step 1)
bead.description:
Source manifest: .ddx/beads-harness-interface-refactor.yaml
Source bead ID: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-01
Governing plan: docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-004-harness-implementation.md

See the manifest and the plan for full context, touch-point inventory, and sub-sequence ordering.
bead.acceptance:
1. internal/harnesses/types.go declares QuotaHarness, AccountHarness, ModelDiscoveryHarness interfaces with the CONTRACT-004 signatures including SupportedLimitIDs() and SupportedAliases()
2. internal/harnesses/types.go declares QuotaStatus, AccountSnapshot, QuotaStateValue, RoutingPreference types and ErrAliasNotResolvable sentinel
3. Unit tests cover RoutingPreference enum identity, QuotaStateValue string mapping, sentinel error identity
4. No harness implements the new interfaces yet; service code is unchanged; go test ./... passes
